rules: replay every command in AUDIT_QUERY_COMMAND_SURFACE_LATEST.json against the exported authority ZIP, not only the live tree
fail closed if any command evidence path is absent from the authority ZIP
fail closed if an export command packet binding path is absent or its SHA does not match the ZIP member bytes
produce a smaller operator-only partition ZIP containing command surfaces, audit packs, tracker, validation reports, and packet-bound evidence
write a containment proof for both the operator-only partition and the final full authority export

see_basis.claim: SLSA provenance only helps when it is inspected and verified by consumers.
OpenTelemetry supports generated, collected, and exported traces/logs/metrics for analysis.
SLSA frames artifact integrity as a supply-chain tamper-resistance problem.
